title: GetErrorMessage Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function GetErrorMessage (ErrorCode As Integer) As String
parameters: ErrorCode	The error code for which to return the associated error message.
description: Returns the error message for the specified error or warning code.
examples:
Dim msg As String
If m_spel.ErrorOn Then
   msg = m_spel.GetErrorMessage(m_spel.ErrorCode)
   MsgBox(msg)
End If
